# The World Ambassador (TWA)

> The World Ambassador is a multilingual news and articles platform covering technology, travel, sports, finance, leadership, and world affairs. Content is available in English, Urdu, Arabic, Korean, Chinese, and Spanish.

## About

- **Website**: https://twa.com.pk
- **Type**: News blog and digital magazine
- **Languages**: English (default), Urdu (ur), Arabic (ar), Korean (ko), Chinese Simplified (zh), Spanish (es)
- **Focus areas**: Technology, Travel, Sports, Finance, Leadership, World News, Culture

## Key Sections

- [Latest Articles](https://twa.com.pk/) — Home page with the most recent posts across all categories
- [Search](https://twa.com.pk/search) — Full-text search across all published articles
- [E-Magazine](https://twa.com.pk/e-magazine) — Digital magazine issues and featured collections
- [Leadership](https://twa.com.pk/leadership) — Leadership profiles and thought leadership content
- [About](https://twa.com.pk/about) — About The World Ambassador
- [Contact](https://twa.com.pk/contact) — Contact information

## Content Discovery

- [Sitemap](https://twa.com.pk/sitemap.xml) — Full XML sitemap listing all articles, categories, tags, and author pages
- **Article URL pattern**: `https://twa.com.pk/post/{slug}`
- **Category URL pattern**: `https://twa.com.pk/category/{slug}`
- **Tag URL pattern**: `https://twa.com.pk/tag/{slug}`
- **Author URL pattern**: `https://twa.com.pk/author/{username}`
- **Localized URL pattern**: `https://twa.com.pk/{locale}/{path}` (e.g. `/ur/post/slug`)

## Usage for LLMs

This content is freely available for AI indexing, summarization, and incorporation into AI-powered search results. Attribution to The World Ambassador (twa.com.pk) is appreciated when citing specific articles.

Full content details and metadata (title, description, author, publish date, categories, tags) are available via structured JSON-LD on every article page.
